content.query:
SELECT 
[_account_id] as AccountID
,[_event_type] as EventType
,[_translated_event_type] as TranslatedEventType
,[_event_time] as EventTime
,[_object_id] as ObjectID
,[_object_type] as ObjectType
,[_object_name] as ObjectName
,[_application_id] as ApplicationID
,[_application_name] as ApplicationName
,[_category] as Category
,[_actor_id] as ActorID
,[_actor_name] as ActorName
,[_date_time_in_timezone] as DateTimeInTimezone
,[_extra_data] as ExtraData
 FROM [RIVERY].[fb_ads_ad_account_activities]
